```{r}
#| echo: false
#| include: false

# Generate download links for the CSV and its metadata.
#
# downloadthis base64-embeds the file into the self-contained HTML. That is convenient for small
# products but a 40 MB CSV becomes ~55 MB of inline base64, which bloats a single page past the
# size that breaks the GitHub Pages deploy (the syncing_files failure). So: embed small files
# (self-contained, works offline), but LINK large files to the repository instead. Metadata .txt
# files are always small, so they are always embedded.
.repo_raw   <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/laurenkolinger/VIRRScore/main/outputs/"
.embed_max  <- 5 * 1024^2  # 5 MB threshold
.csv_name   <- gsub("/", "", gsub(subfoldername, "", output_files$csv_filename))
.csv_size   <- if (file.exists(output_files$csv_filename)) file.size(output_files$csv_filename) else 0

if (.csv_size > .embed_max) {
  csv_download_link <- paste0(
    "[download ", .csv_name, " (", round(.csv_size / 1024^2), " MB) from the repository](",
    .repo_raw, .csv_name, ")"
  )
} else {
  csv_download_link <- paste0(
    "{{< downloadthis `r '", output_files$csv_filename,
    "'` dname='", .csv_name, "' label='download ", .csv_name, "' >}}"
  )
}
metadata_download_link <- paste0(
  "{{< downloadthis `r '",
  output_files$metadata_filename,
  "'` dname='",
  gsub("/", "", gsub(subfoldername, '', output_files$metadata_filename)),
  "' label='download metadata' >}}"
)
# code-download: the page's own .qmd source (a small text file, so it is always embedded).
.qmd_src <- tryCatch(knitr::current_input(), error = function(e) NULL)
qmd_download_link <- if (!is.null(.qmd_src) && file.exists(.qmd_src)) {
  paste0("{{< downloadthis `r '", .qmd_src, "'` dname='", .qmd_src,
         "' label='download page source (.qmd)' icon='file-earmark-code' type='light' >}}")
} else ""
```


```{r}
#| output: asis
#| echo: false
# make this print in qmd output as regular out of markdown text
m <- knitr::knit_child(text = c(csv_download_link,
                                "",
                                metadata_download_link,
                                "",
                                qmd_download_link), envir = environment(), quiet = TRUE)
cat(m)
```
